dashboard.label: Ping Monitor Setup
dashboard.description: Configure the indexes and sourcetype used by the Ping Monitor dashboards, reports, and alerts.

search.query: | inputlookup ping_monitor_settings_lookup | search _key="global" | head 1 | append [| makeresults | eval index="ping", sourcetype="ping_monitor", metrics_index="ping_metrics", configured=0, last_updated="Never"] | head 1 | eval refresh_token="$config_refresh$" | eval index=coalesce(index, "ping"), sourcetype=coalesce(sourcetype, "ping_monitor"), metrics_index=coalesce(metrics_index, "ping_metrics") | eval last_updated=coalesce(last_updated, "Never") | eval record_present=if(isnull(_key) OR _key=="", "no", "yes") | eval configured_text=lower(tostring(configured)) | eval is_configured=if(configured_text=="true" OR configured_text=="1" OR record_present=="yes", "yes", "no") | fields - refresh_token, configured_text, record_present

html.p: Setup complete. Ping Monitor is currently reading events from $current_index$ with sourcetype $current_sourcetype$ and metrics from $current_metrics_index$.
Only change these values if your deployment writes data to a different index, sourcetype, or metrics index.
Setup not saved yet. Ping Monitor is using the defaults shown below until you save a configuration record.
If your deployment already uses these defaults, save once so the rest of the app has an explicit configuration to read.
Only three values drive the app: the event index, the event sourcetype, and the metrics index. Blank values are converted back to the documented defaults when you save.
Changes are written to the ping_monitor_settings_lookup KV Store collection and become available to dashboards and saved searches on the next page load.

search.query: | makeresults | eval _key="global", index=if(trim("$form_index$")=="", "ping", trim("$form_index$")), sourcetype=if(trim("$form_sourcetype$")=="", "ping_monitor", trim("$form_sourcetype$")), metrics_index=if(trim("$form_metrics_index$")=="", "ping_metrics", trim("$form_metrics_index$")), configured=1, last_updated=strftime(now(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | outputlookup ping_monitor_settings_lookup key_field=_key | eval save_message="Configuration saved at " . last_updated | eval save_details="Events Index: " . index . " | Sourcetype: " . sourcetype . " | Metrics Index: " . metrics_index | fields index, sourcetype, metrics_index, last_updated, save_message, save_details

html.p: The Effective settings section above refreshes from KV Store and should now match these values.

ol.li: Open Ping Monitor Overview and confirm that event or metrics data is appearing with the values above.
Open Asset Health Correlation to confirm it resolves the same configuration.
Enable packaged saved searches and alerts only after these settings match your deployment.
